title: narcissus bulbocodium var. pallidus
intro: Narcissus bulbocodium var. pallidus, also known as the pale bulbous narcissus, is a subspecies of flowering bulbous plant in the genus Narcissus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Narcissus bulbocodium var. pallidus include its potential to aid in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant include tinctures and infusions, which can be used to make topical applications for skin conditions and as a natural remedy for respiratory issues.
